PAGE-HERO.intent: Full-width hero section — headline, subtitle, primary CTA. Use as the first visible section after nav.
PAGE-HERO.when-to-use: Every page. Always first after SITE-NAV.

accepts.name: HERO-SUBTITLE
accepts.comment: Supporting paragraph — one or two sentences

accepts.name: CTA-LABEL
accepts.comment: Primary call to action button label

accepts.name: CTA-HREF
accepts.comment: Button destination — full URL or root-relative path

SITE-NAV.intent: Sticky top navigation bar with logo and nav links. Use on every page.

accepts.name: SITE-LOGO
accepts.comment: Logo text displayed in the nav bar

accepts.name: NAV-ITEMS
accepts.comment: Group of nav links — each item has a label (X(30)) and HREF (X(80))

CARD-SECTION.intent: Labelled section containing a card grid. Use for features, resources, portfolio entries.
CARD-SECTION.when-to-use: After hero. For any grouped content that benefits from card layout.

accepts.name: CARDS
accepts.comment: Group of cards — each card has TITLE (X(60)), BODY (X(200)), HREF (X(80))

STAT-SECTION.intent: Labelled section containing a stat grid. Use for metrics, KPIs, case study numbers.
STAT-SECTION.when-to-use: After hero or after a text section. For quantitative content.

accepts.name: STATS
accepts.comment: Group of stats — each stat has VALUE (X(10)) and LABEL (X(30))

accepts.name: STAT-COLUMNS
accepts.comment: Number of grid columns — typically 3 or 4

children.comment: Stat label — e.g. CAL Fetch Score

SITE-FOOTER.intent: Simple footer with copyright or tagline text. Use on every page as the last section.
SITE-FOOTER.when-to-use: Always last in PROCEDURE DIVISION, before STOP RUN.

accepts.name: FOOTER-TEXT
accepts.comment: Copyright line or tagline — e.g. © 2026 StratIQX
